notes: swift build --target SpeakCore blocked by os.log on Linux
Sentry binary blocks swift test on Linux - macOS CI needed
os.log and SwiftUI/CloudKit block swift test on Linux entirely
AppSettingsDefaultsTests uses custom UserDefaults suite via DI - SettingsSync uses singleton so tearDown cleanup used instead
ConfigTransferPayload.timestamp is a mutable var (settable in tests)
ConfigTransferError is not Equatable - use pattern matching in XCTAssertThrowsError
